subject: A regal woman in a pale flowing gown standing in a frost-covered hall, holding a tall staff crowned with a radiant snowflake/icicle ornament
description: A tall, poised noblewoman stands in the foreground of an arched, frost-rimed hall. She wears a long pale gown with cool blue highlights and a fitted bodice; her hair is light and styled long. In one hand she holds a slender staff or scepter topped with a glowing snowflake/icicle motif that radiates a soft pale-blue light, the brightest point in the composition. Behind her, a vaulted interior recedes into hazy cold light, with what appear to be tall arched windows or columns and a chilled, misty atmosphere. The palette is dominated by icy blues, pale whites, and silvery greys, with the figure rendered almost monochromatically against the frozen architecture.
foreground: robed noblewoman holding a snowflake-tipped staff
background: frost-covered vaulted hall with arched windows and cold ambient haze
